title: guettarda crispiflora subsp. poasana
intro: Guettarda crispiflora subsp. poasana is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to Costa Rica and the surrounding regions, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Traditional herbal preparations of Guettarda crispiflora subsp. poasana include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can provide relief from pain, inflammation, and other symptoms associated with various diseases. Furthermore, the plant's medicinal properties are also believed to offer antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial benefits, making it a subject of interest for further research and potential applications in modern medicine.
